data.answer: Based on the DIGEST, for the test quarter 2014Q2, the Leverage Ratio was 3.606x, which is below the §6.6A threshold of 3.75x, so the borrower is compliant with headroom of +0.144x [10]. The adjusted EBITDA of 965.0 includes a Device Strategy addback of 100 (with 30 disallowed against a lifetime cap of 290) and a Quality addback of 40 [DIGEST].

The adjusted EBITDA of 965.0 includes a Device Strategy addback of 100 (with 30 disallowed against a lifetime cap of 290) and a Quality addback of 40 [DIGEST]."}
